headline: GLOBAL TRANSFORMATION LEADERS JOIN AOKAH ADVISORY BOARD
summary: Aokah, the AI + Expert Intelligence and Orchestration Platform purpose-built for Global Capability Centers and enterprise operations, announced the formation of its Advisory Board. The Board brings together globally respected leaders in business transformation, global business services (GBS), finance, and organizational performance.
